---
title: "City of Mount Vernon, Washington Collection Rate Study"
year: 2025
image: /images/mt_vernon_WA.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Mt. Vernon, Washington"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
Bell & Associates has assisted the City of Mount Vernon since 2019 with rate
consulting services for the City’s waste collection operation and prospective
residential recycling programs. Mr. Bell recommended a cost-of-service rate
structure to maintain city services and provide adequate fund reserves and
capital replacement.

[By Quintin Soloviev - Own work, CC BY 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=192408690)

:::
